title: picris cupuligera
intro: Picris cupuligera is a species of plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the bitter lettuce or bitter chicory due to its bitter taste. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation, thanks to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Picris cupuligera include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural diuretic. Picris cupuligera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and in some cases, it's also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
